readiness_note: All five candidates in the current two-source packet are classified. Two genuine tokens establish natural attestation, but two small user-supplied sources do not satisfy the broader diverse-corpus gate or establish productivity.

decisions.matched_surface_span: 你饮咗酒你千祈唔好开车啊
decisions.reviewerNote: The conditional antecedent contains the narrow AB30 profile 飲 + 咗 + overt object 酒. The larger conditional structure does not remove the local V–咗–object constituent.
Clear overt AB30 token: 攞 + 咗 + quantified classifier NP 兩份申請表. The final particle 啦 is outside the narrow VP constituent.
講 is followed by 咗 and a final particle, with the reported content omitted and supplied by the following clause. 同佢 is preverbal and is not an overt post-咗 object.
decisions.exclusionReason: Objectless V–咗 clause with discourse-recoverable content; AB30 requires an overt licensed NP after 咗.

decisions.matched_surface_span: 咁大概开咗5个钟头车到啦
decisions.reviewerNote: The post-咗 material is the duration expression 五個鐘頭. 車 belongs to the driving-duration expression rather than functioning as the overt object NP required by AB30.
decisions.exclusionReason: Duration constituent follows V–咗; the token is outside the narrow simple V–咗–object profile.

decisions.reviewerNote: 超咗 has an omitted comparison threshold; 就唔得 begins the consequence clause and is not an overt object NP.
decisions.exclusionReason: Objectless perfective or change-of-state predicate inside a conditional-consequence sequence; AB30 requires an overt licensed NP after 咗.
